title: • Evidence and support
content:
• Evidence and support
• Tone and audience
• Proofread carefully for grammar, clarity, and APA formatting.

⸻

✍️ Instructions:
1. Review your Round 1 draft and peer feedback.
2. Make substantial revisions based on what was suggested.
3. Submit your revised essay along with a short Revision Note (2–3 sentences) explaining what you improved.

Example Revision Note:

I clarified my thesis in the introduction, added examples to Paragraph 2, and improved transitions between body paragraphs.

⸻

✅ Rubric (Total: 100 pts)

Criteria Points
Significant Revisions Applied 30 pts
Improved Organization and Support 25 pts
Clearer Compare/Contrast Balance 20 pts
Grammar, APA, and Clarity Improvements 15 pts
Revision Note Submitted 10 pts



⸻

Would you like me to package these as .docx or .pdf files for upload?
context: From document: ✅ Assignment 3A: Peer Review Letter – Compare & Contrast Essay — chunk 10 (chunk 10/11)
